query: Sovereign Lake Loppet cross country ski race Sovereign Lake Nordic Centre

videos.title: Scott_Olypic_speal.m4v
videos.description: Manager of Sovereign Lake Nordic Centre describes the teams training for the Olympics at Sovereign Lake
videos.transcript:
hi i'm scott lemon general manager of
the sovereign lincoln arctic center
here to talk about some of the olympic
teams that are training with us for the
next couple of weeks
we have up to eight teams training here
daily mostly in the mornings and
the number of athletes does vary from
day to day we've got teams here both
training for
biathlon as well as for the cross
country events for the 2010 olympics
we do have two active biathlon ranges
here right now and the norwegians have
been here using them
almost daily for the past week and the
teams will be on site for
about another week until about february
the 6th and then most of them will be
heading down to the callahan valley to
the olympic site

videos.title: Interview w/Andy Shields Men's Sprint Winner @Haywood NorAm Sovereign Lake
videos.transcript:
yeah this is probably my seventh time in
the freezing here at sovereign lake is
really beautiful snow today weather was
a little chilly but a fairly good day
for racing smells amazing here as always
so makes it extra fun to race here at my
race is pretty good we're pretty happy
with the qualifier qualified first and
then heats emotionally as I could and
then had a lotta juice left to the final
yeah it's my first nor I'm win my Cinco
diem so pretty happy with that anyways
smelly had a windy this year so it's
good to get one before Christmas ok I'd
also like to thank my support crew our
wax texts were amazing today had killer
skis and then all the team might be NBC
Thunder Bay my ski team will be everyone
who's behind us all our sponsors and
support crew been really appreciated and
help me get flew in today so thanks very
much

videos.title: Sovereign Lake 'Spring Fling' pushup time trial (May 6, 2017)
videos.description:
FasterSkier was on site and participated in the first-annual Sovereign Lake pushups classic time trial at the nordic centre near Vernon, B.C., on May 6, 2017. (Video: Gerry Furseth)

Read more: http://fasterskier.com/fsarticle/wednesday-workout-sovereign-lake-spring-fling-pushups-time-trial/
